title: CepalStatR: Access to ECLAC (CEPALSTAT) Statistics via R — CepalStatR-package
Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: Retrieves CEPALSTAT thematic tree returns data frame hierarchical structure areas, dimensions, subdimensions, indicators, final indicator IDs.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: language.en Logical. TRUE (default), results returned English labels. FALSE, results returned Spanish labels. progress Logical. TRUE, status messages displayed download processing.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: data frame containing hierarchical thematic structure CEPALSTAT indicators final indicator IDs.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
code: data.indicators <- call.indicators() #> Downloading thematic tree from CEPALSTAT... #> Parsing indicator hierarchy... #> Finished downloading indicators. data.indicators <- call.indicators(language.en = FALSE) #> Descargando árbol temático desde CEPALSTAT... #> Procesando jerarquía de indicadores... #> Descarga de indicadores finalizada.
